name: Birds Nest Bar & Grille and Golf at the Nest
address: 415 York Rd Ste 6, New Hope, PA 18938
about: Birds Nest Bar & Grille and Golf at the Nest is a dual-venue establishment featuring a full-service restaurant and bar alongside a modern indoor golf simulator facility. The golf portion of the venue houses 3 state-of-the-art TrackMan simulator bays, offering a premium experience for golf enthusiasts. Guests can enjoy realistic gameplay, accurate swing analysis, and access to a variety of world-class courses, all within a lively and welcoming atmosphere that combines sports entertainment with dining options.
why_golfers_like_it: Features 3 state-of-the-art TrackMan simulator bays for a premium experience
Offers accurate swing analysis and a variety of world-class courses
Combines golf with a full-service bar and grille for a complete entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service grille with menu available for takeout

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art TrackMan indoor golf simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and grille. While bringing outside food may not be permitted, you can order from their menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulation, but typical simulator rounds usually take 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates as a sports bar and grille with a family-friendly atmosphere, making it suitable for kids.
